item:
Concept: “find (X finds Y)”
Statement: In every case of “find (X finds Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Concept: “gift”
Statement: In every case of “gift”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Concept: “inside (X is inside Y)”
Statement: In every case of “inside (X is inside Y)” as described above, X is a time — a moment or stretch of time; normally a time long past.

Statement: In every case of “take (X takes Y)”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Concept: “promise (the words)”
Statement: Every promise is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a place far away.

Statement: In every case of “archived (bookmark boolean property)”, there is a place that makes it happen on purpose — normally a place far away.

Statement: Every celebration is a place — somewhere one can be; normally a large place.
